title: AudioGenerator
description: Procedural tone generator — produces audio from an `OscillatorNode` without any decoded asset. Good for prototyping, game-jam SFX, retro bleeps, and synth-style tones. `AudioGenerator` is a **data descriptor**: it holds the current synth settings (`frequency`, `type`, `detune`, `envelope`) and default playback parameters. Each `AudioManager.play(generator, options)` snapshots those settings into a fresh AudioGeneratorVoice and returns it. For per-note playback, set `generator.frequency` (or use AudioGenerator.setNote) before playing: ```ts generator.setNote(69); // A4 const voice = app.audio.play(generator); // ...later voice.frequency = 880; // retune the live voice voice.stop(); // triggers the envelope release, if any ``` Routes through the manager's `sound` bus by default.

sections.title: Import
paragraphs: Procedural tone generator — produces audio from an `OscillatorNode` without any decoded asset. Good for prototyping, game-jam SFX, retro bleeps, and synth-style tones.

`AudioGenerator` is a **data descriptor**: it holds the current synth settings (`frequency`, `type`, `detune`, `envelope`) and default playback parameters. Each `AudioManager.play(generator, options)` snapshots those settings into a fresh AudioGeneratorVoice and returns it. For per-note playback, set `generator.frequency` (or use AudioGenerator.setNote) before playing:
```ts generator.setNote(69); // A4 const voice = app.audio.play(generator); // ...later voice.frequency = 880; // retune the live voice voice.stop(); // triggers the envelope release, if any ```
Routes through the manager's `sound` bus by default.

members.name: _createVoice
members.description: Implements Playable. Called by AudioManager.play. Snapshots the current synth settings into a new AudioGeneratorVoice. Returns an already-ended NoopVoice when the AudioContext is still locked by the autoplay policy — oscillators are ephemeral and cannot be deferred.

members.name: setNote
members.description: Set AudioGenerator.frequency from a MIDI note number (69 = A4 = 440 Hz).

members.name: stopAll
members.description: Stop every currently active voice from this generator.

members.name: midiToFrequency
members.description: Frequency in Hz for a MIDI note number, without mutating the generator.

members.name: envelope
members.description: Optional ADSR envelope applied to each voice.

members.name: frequency
members.description: Current oscillator frequency in Hz. Snapshotted into each new voice.

members.name: muted
members.description: Default muted flag (starts a voice at volume 0).

members.name: priority
members.description: Priority for the LowestPriority eviction strategy.

members.name: volume
members.description: Default volume for new voices. Range [0, 1].
